findings.evidence: `homeomorph` is defined at `TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Isotopy.lean:459`, and `finalHomeomorph` is defined as `Φ.homeomorph 1` at line 467; the PR adds only endpoint lemmas at lines 485, 561, and 611.
findings.fix: Add general simp lemmas such as `(refl Y).homeomorph t = Homeomorph.refl Y`, `(Φ.trans Ψ).homeomorph t = (Φ.homeomorph t).trans (Ψ.homeomorph t)`, and `Φ.symm.homeomorph t = (Φ.homeomorph t).symm`, then derive or replace the final lemmas by the `t = 1` cases.
findings.issue: `finalHomeomorph_refl`, `finalHomeomorph_trans`, and `finalHomeomorph_symm` prove only the endpoint case even though `finalHomeomorph` is just `homeomorph 1`, so the API duplicates special cases instead of the natural time-`t` result.

summary: The new endpoint lemmas are under-generalized relative to the existing `homeomorph (t : I)` API; the natural statements should be time-parameter functoriality lemmas with these `finalHomeomorph` facts as `t = 1` special cases.
